mode.description: Primary optimization objective. depth minimizes logic levels; area minimizes gate count.

mig_flow.description: MIG pass schedule preset. standard is a safe default; dac19_* and compress2rs are alternative optimization recipes.

mig_allow_zero_gain.description: Allow rewrites that do not immediately improve cost. Can unlock later gains but may increase runtime.

rw_override.description: Enable explicit rewrite parameter overrides (rw_cut, rw_cut_limit).

rw_cut.description: Cut size for rewriting when rw_override is enabled.

rw_cut_limit.description: Cut enumeration limit for rewriting when rw_override is enabled.
